role_summary: the quality review auditor evaluates audit quality, methodologies, and compliance with  professional sta ndards.
responsibilities: • review audit files for quality and standard compliance   • assess adherence to auditing standards and firm policies   • identify gaps in audit execution and documentation   • provide feedback and recommendations to audit teams   • support aud it quality improvement initiatives   • assist in regulatory and peer reviews
qualifications: • ca with strong audit and quality review experience   • in-depth knowledge of auditing standards   • strong evaluation and reporting skills         forensic, risk & complia nce roles
